articles.title: I’ve been trying Copilot Tasks this week, and it’s awesome to assign tasks (even recurring) in this cowork mode and have them completed end to end autonomously and use Agent mode to refine and iterate on the outputs. Here’s an example … Create a spreadsheet, analyze the data in Excel, and then schedule tasks based on the output. And there’s a lot more. If you want to try it, sign up here.
